Schnittstelle CandidacyRepository

Alle Superschnittstellen:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<Candidacy, Long>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Candidacy, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<Candidacy, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<Candidacy, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<Candidacy, Long>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<Candidacy>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<Candidacy, Long>
@Repository public interface CandidacyRepository extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<Candidacy, Long>
